meta.content: Are tooth gems safe? Do they damage enamel? How long do they last and what do they cost in Sacramento? Every tooth gem question, answered by a certified artist.
Tooth Gem FAQ — Glow by Chlo
Safety, cost, longevity, and removal — every tooth gem question answered.

div.p: The honest answers — safety first, sparkle second.

details.summary: Do tooth gems damage your teeth?
details.div: No. Gems are bonded to the surface of the enamel with dental-grade composite — the same class of material orthodontists use for brackets. There's no drilling, no filing, no holes. When a gem is professionally removed and the tooth is polished, your enamel is exactly as we found it.

details.summary: How long do tooth gems last?
details.div: Most gems last 3–12 months; well-placed gems with good aftercare regularly push past a year. Placement, eating habits, and whether you pick at it (don't) are the big variables. Anything we placed that pops off within the first 30 days gets replaced free.

details.summary: How much do tooth gems cost?
details.div: A single Swarovski crystal is $55, extra crystals are +$20 ea, shaped gems start at from $70, and full signature collections run $185–$265. The full menu lives on the collections page.

Not at all. No drilling, no needles, no anesthetic needed. Your tooth gets cleaned and prepped, the gem is set with bond, and an LED light cures it in seconds. The hardest part is holding a smile for 15 minutes.

details.summary: Can I eat and drink normally?
details.div: Yes — after a short break-in. Nothing for the first hour, then avoid hard/sticky/chewy foods for 48 hours while the bond fully sets. After that, live your life. Full protocol is on the aftercare page.

details.summary: What if my gem falls off?
details.div: Within 30 days of placement: free replacement — DM us a pic and rebook. After 30 days: reapplication is priced as a new single gem. Either way, don't try to re-stick it yourself; craft glue and enamel are not friends.

Removal takes a few minutes: we gently lift the gem, then polish the tooth smooth. It's $20, painless, and leaves zero trace. Never pry one off at home — that's the only way this process can scratch enamel.
Yes — clients 16–17 need a parent or guardian present at the appointment. 18+ can book solo. We'll ask for ID at check-in when it's close.

details.summary: Do gems work on veneers, crowns, or bonding?
details.div: Gems bond best to natural enamel. Placement on veneers or crowns is sometimes possible but holds differently and can affect the restoration's glaze — tell us when you book and we'll give you a straight answer before you pay for anything.

details.summary: Should I whiten before or after?
details.div: Before. Whitening gel can't reach the enamel under your gem, so whiten first, then book your sparkle on the new shade.

div.p: Still curious? DM @glowbychlo.co — we answer everything.
Certified Swarovski tooth gems. Studio appointments in Roseville, mobile across the Sacramento area.
